overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking through a bustling medieval town. The character traverses a crowded central square with half-timbered architecture, transitions through narrow cobblestone alleys with wooden scaffolding, and emerges into a harbor market area with large ship sails visible in the distance, all under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town square with market stalls and stone terraces

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the crowded town square, navigating between market stalls and groups of NPCs

notable_agents.action: bard playing a lute on the stone terrace steps

entered.detail: traditional medieval half-timbered houses with white plaster and dark wooden beams
raised stone platform with steps leading up to building entrances
market stall with red and white striped canopy
wooden market stall with yellow signage and barrels

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a bustling medieval town square filled with NPCs. Half-timbered buildings surround the cobblestone plaza, with market stalls featuring red canopies and a bard playing music on the stone terrace steps to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between main square and narrow streets with clock tower building

events.description: Geralt turns left and continues walking along the perimeter of the square
moving into shadow cast by taller buildings, reducing direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns left and walks along the square's edge toward a narrower street, passing wooden carts and scaffolding

entered.detail: tall stone building with clock face and dark timber framing
wooden construction scaffolding against building walls
wooden cart with canvas cover parked near the street

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns left and moves along the square's perimeter, passing a wooden market cart and approaching a narrow street. The stone clock tower building dominates the view ahead while wooden scaffolding appears on the right, and the crowd thins slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with wooden scaffolding and construction materials

events.description: enters narrow alleyway with overhead wooden scaffolding and construction barriers
passes under wooden scaffolding structure and stone archway

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the narrow passage with scaffolding overhead and stone walls on both sides, approaching the harbor

entered.detail: overhead wooden scaffolding beams crossing the alley
tall stone building walls forming the narrow passage
wooden barrels and construction materials stacked along the wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a narrow alleyway enclosed by stone walls and wooden scaffolding. The space is shadowed and sheltered, with construction materials visible. He passes under an overhead wooden structure as he approaches the harbor area visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor market with tents and ship sails visible

events.description: exits narrow alley and emerges into open harbor market area
large white ship sails become visible in the distance beyond the market tents

agents.ego_description: Geralt emerges into the bustling harbor market and walks toward the docks, passing merchants and market tents

notable_agents.action: merchant arranging goods at a wooden market stall

entered.detail: canvas market tents and temporary stalls set up in the harbor area
tall white sails of ships docked in the harbor visible in the distance
wooden buildings and dock structures along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the narrow alley into a bright, open harbor market filled with canvas tents and wooden stalls. Large ship sails are visible in the distance beyond the market, and the ground transitions to dirt and gravel as he walks among merchants and shoppers toward the docks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling medieval town square into the bright, open expanse of a harbor market. It begins amidst a crowded cobblestone plaza surrounded by half-timbered buildings and red-canopied stalls, passing a bard performing on stone terrace steps. As Geralt turns left, the scene shifts toward the perimeter of the square, moving past a wooden market cart and toward a dominating stone clock tower as the crowd begins to thin. The camera then follows him into a shadowed, narrow alleyway enclosed by stone walls and wooden scaffolding, passing under overhead structures that shelter the path. Finally, the space opens up as he emerges from the alley into a sunlit harbor market filled with canvas tents, where the ground transitions to dirt and gravel and large ship sails appear in the distance.
